category_sources: Official CGSecurity homepage https://www.cgsecurity.org/wiki/TestDisk presents TestDisk as the project site.
source_facts.description says TestDisk is a free data recovery utility; source_facts.executables include testdisk and photorec.
display_name_sources: Official homepage title/source_facts.homepage uses the name TestDisk.
docs_sources: Official CGSecurity PDF is titled TestDisk Documentation.
source_facts.homepage is the official CGSecurity TestDisk wiki page.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty, so repository was determined from official CGSecurity developers page, which identifies https://git.cgsecurity.org/testdisk.git as the official git repository and GitHub as a mirror.
tags_sources: Official CGSecurity TestDisk materials describe partition recovery and filesystem repair use cases.
source_facts.description identifies data recovery utility behavior.
source_facts.executables list CLI tools testdisk, photorec, and fidentify.
